title: Bio-blocks comprising endothelial cells and methods of use thereof
abstract: A bio-block useful for bioprinting and tissue engineering, compositions comprising the bio-block, methods of preparing the bio-block, methods of using the bio-block, and constructs prepared using the bio-block or bio-ink compositions. The bio-block comprises a core comprising an endothelial cell and a shell.
